narrative:
18 Ohio Senate district has 264,775 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.7 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +2.8% D−R vs -0.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
